name: health-task-tracker-android
description: Installable Android PWA for tracking tasks, health metrics, nutrition, and weight.

scripts.sync:www: cp index.html www/index.html && cp app.js www/app.js && cp styles.css www/styles.css && cp service-worker.js www/service-worker.js
scripts.sync:android-assets: npm run sync:www && mkdir -p android/app/src/main/assets/public && cp -R www/. android/app/src/main/assets/public/
scripts.build:apk: npm run check && npm run sync:android-assets && cd android && ./gradlew -PlocalSdk34 -Pandroid.aapt2FromMavenOverride=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/aapt2 assembleDebug
scripts.bundle:release: npm run check && npm run sync:android-assets && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.play:bundle: npm run bundle:release && mkdir -p dist/play && cp android/app/build/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab dist/play/HealthTaskTracker-release.aab
